tagline: Neon Skyscrapers, Ancient Temples & Michelin Gastronomy

days.dateLabel: Day 1 - Historic Asakusa & Digital Art Wonderland

activities.title: Senso-ji Temple & Nakamise Dori Shopping Street
activities.description: Visit Tokyo's oldest and most colorful Buddhist temple, passing beneath the giant red Kaminarimon lantern.

activities.title: Tsukiji Outer Market Fresh Sashimi & Wagyu Skewers
activities.description: Graze through bustling alleyways serving melt-in-your-mouth bluefin tuna bowls, tamagoyaki, and A5 Wagyu beef.

activities.title: teamLab Planets Immersive Digital Art Museum
activities.description: Walk barefoot through sparkling crystal universes and glowing water projections inside Toyosu's world-famous digital exhibit.

days.dateLabel: Day 2 - Harajuku Fashion, Meiji Shrine & Shibuya Sky

activities.title: Meiji Shrine & Forest Sanctuary Stroll
activities.description: Walk beneath massive cedar torii gates into Tokyo's most peaceful Shinto shrine nestled right in the city center.

activities.title: Takeshita Street Crepes & Omotesando Boutiques
activities.description: Experience Harajuku's wild youth street culture before exploring high-end architectural flagship stores on Omotesando.

activities.title: Shibuya Crossing & Sunset at Shibuya Sky Observatory
activities.description: Cross the world's busiest intersection before riding up to the 360-degree open-air roofdeck for Mount Fuji sunset views.

days.dateLabel: Day 3 - Akihabara Electric Town & Shinjuku Nightlife

activities.title: Akihabara Anime, Gaming & Electronics Exploration
activities.description: Immerse yourself in retro arcade towers, electronics mega-stores, and vibrant pop-culture sanctuaries.

activities.title: Michelin-Starred Tonkatsu at Ginza Bairin
activities.description: Savor premium Berkshire pork cutlets fried to golden perfection with sweet tonkatsu sauce and fluffy cabbage.

activities.title: Omoide Yokocho (Memory Lane) Izakaya Crawl
activities.description: Feast on charcoal-grilled yakitori and chilled Japanese beer inside atmospheric red-lantern alleyways in Shinjuku.
